expectations.text: want preserved verbatim OR user offered alternative and chose
expectations.evidence: preserved verbatim, alternative offered in response

expectations.text: Response flags want as solution-shaped AND suggests outcome-shaped alternative
expectations.evidence: response.md proposes 'cancel a request I've already submitted, because I sometimes change my mind...'

expectations.text: Flagged phrasing distinguishes outcome vs UI
expectations.evidence: response explicitly contrasts 'what to achieve' (cancel) with 'how UI shows it' (button vs menu vs swipe vs auto-expiry)

expectations.text: EXTRA: derived AC stay problem-side despite solution-shaped want
expectations.evidence: AC bullets: 'requestor can cancel', 'cancellation is only possible while...', 'a cancelled request is visibly marked' — no UI prescriptions
